global.title: Trump threatens Iran strikes, says too soon for new direct talks after reporting "great progress"
global.summary: U.S.-Iran tensions remain volatile as President Trump spoke of progress toward a deal while also threatening further strikes if Iran refuses terms.
global.whyItMatters: This shapes prayer, preaching, and pastoral care around fear, peace, and the human cost of conflict.

global.title: Oil expert warns of ‘nightmare scenario’ Iran war could spark
global.summary: A PBS analysis warns that conflict involving Iran could disrupt energy markets and drive wider economic pain for ordinary households.
global.whyItMatters: Rising fuel and living costs affect families in every congregation and create openings for compassionate, grounded ministry.

global.title: Cuba plunged into darkness as power grid collapses for third time this year - NBC News
global.summary: Cuba’s electrical grid has failed again, leaving the island without power for the third time this year and deepening an already severe humanitarian strain.
global.whyItMatters: It is a reminder to pray for vulnerable populations and to keep global suffering visible before the church.

canadian.title: Toronto stocks inch up as oil climbs; investors await Fed minutes - KITCO
canadian.summary: Canada’s main stock index rose modestly as oil prices climbed on renewed fears around shipping near the Strait of Hormuz, with attention also on central bank signals.
canadian.whyItMatters: Energy volatility can quickly affect household budgets, church benevolence needs, and the economic mood of congregations.

canadian.title: Artemis II astronaut Jeremy Hansen is stepping down - NBC News
canadian.summary: Canadian astronaut Jeremy Hansen is reportedly stepping down from the Artemis II mission, marking a notable change in a high-profile Canadian space role.
canadian.whyItMatters: This is a significant Canadian public story about leadership transition, disappointment, and resilience under public expectations.

persecutedChurch.title: Pastor freed from Chinese prison after Trump raised his case with Xi Jinping - Fox News
persecutedChurch.summary: Pastor Ezra Jin of Beijing’s Zion Church has been released and reunited with family in the U.S. after international pressure, though the wider crackdown on unregistered churches remains severe.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: This is both an answer to prayer and a prompt to keep interceding for believers still detained in China.

persecutedChurch.title: As Christians are attacked in Israel, government shows little concern - The Washington Post
persecutedChurch.summary: A Washington Post report says Christians in Israel are facing rising hostility and violence, with many feeling attackers have grown bolder.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: It broadens the church’s awareness that Christian vulnerability is not limited to one region and calls for informed prayer.

leadership.title: Escaping The Survival Mode That Sabotages Leadership - Forbes
leadership.summary: This piece argues that resilient leadership requires intentional pauses, boundaries, and ‘white-space’ time rather than constant urgency and endurance.
leadership.whyItMatters: A pastor leading through nonstop demands needs permission to pause so he can lead with steadiness instead of depletion.

goodNews.title: Good News: Bride-to-be’s hotel hail mary pays off ahead of her wedding - NBC News
goodNews.summary: An NFL team owner unexpectedly stepped in to help a bride-to-be with a last-minute hotel need before her wedding.
goodNews.whyItMatters: It is a simple story of generosity that can refresh a pastor’s imagination for everyday kindness and providence.
